title: Unique 26370 Reusable Foil Stamped Plastic Cups-473 ml-Bright Triangle Birthday Party-6 Count (Pack of 1), Multicolour
features: Pack of 6 Bright Triangle Birthday Plastic Cups
Plastic cups can hold up to 473 ml and are BPA-free
Ideal for serving drinks at any birthday party
Give as a game prize, or fill with sweets and party favours
Combine with other Bright Triangle Birthday party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Give party drinks some festive flair with our Bright Triangle Birthday Plastic Cups. These 295 millilitre party cups feature a foil-stamped design, making them a stylish choice for your birthday bash. Use these cups to complete your place settings, or leave them in a stack at your drink station for easy self-serving. Then, hand-wash these reusable cups to use them at your next celebration. Upgrade the rest of your party space and shop more of our birthday party supplies today. Safety Warning Hand wash only. Do not microwave.
